channel.title: SPL - Magnolia Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Magnolia Branch

item.title: Tea Meditation
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Magnolia Branch

A Tea Meditation event is a calm, grounding experience designed to help you cultivate presence, slow down your mind, and reconnect with your senses through the simple yet profound ritual of drinking tea. It blends traditional meditation practices with mindful tea consumption.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Friday, March 13, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Magnolia Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Connect Across Generations by Tapping into Your Emotional Intelligence
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Magnolia Branch, Meeting Room

Do you feel like you need a tool set to navigate the emotionally overwhelming experience of living with and supporting family?

Event details
